text.title: VUI Market Context Core Rules
text.summary: 5 testable rules anchoring how a VUI market brief must be sourced, scoped, and refreshed.

rule.statement: Every market statistic MUST carry four fields: value, year, source URL, geographic scope. Stats missing any field MUST be rejected.
rule.rationale: Voice adoption varies 3-5x between US and global figures; an unscoped "62% use voice assistants" misleads strategy decisions and cannot be re-verified.

rule.statement: The brief MUST distinguish three denominator categories: smart-speaker households, voice-assistant users, voice-search query share. Cross-category math is forbidden.
rule.rationale: These denominators come from different measurement methodologies (device ownership vs intent sessions vs query type on one engine); mixing them inflates the picture arbitrarily.

rule.statement: Every brief MUST be stamped with `refreshed_at` (ISO date). A brief older than 90 days MUST NOT be published; refresh first.
rule.rationale: LLM-native voice agents (ChatGPT Voice, Claude voice) reshape the landscape faster than canonical sources track; >90 days old stats may be wrong on direction, not just magnitude.

rule.statement: Refresh queries MUST restrict sources to the allowlist: statista.com, voicebot.ai, edisonresearch.com, nngroup.com, pewresearch.org, gartner.com. SEO listicles and secondary aggregators MUST be rejected.
rule.rationale: LLMs default to high-traffic listicles that cite each other; an explicit allowlist breaks circular citation and forces primary sources.

rule.statement: Custom LLM-VUI (OpenAI Realtime, Claude voice, ElevenLabs Conversational, Pipecat, Vapi, Retell) MUST be treated as a fifth platform category — not a feature of Alexa/Google/Siri. Platform comparison tables MUST include a dedicated LLM-native row.
rule.rationale: LLM-native agents bypass skill stores and certification, support open-domain dialog, and have different design requirements (no intent/slot NLU); conflating them with intent platforms produces broken systems.

rule.statement: If the request is implementation work, locked single-vendor decision, or real-time competitive intel, the methodology MUST be skipped and the caller routed to vui-conversation-design / market-researcher respectively.
rule.rationale: Applying market-context machinery to the wrong workflow burns tokens without producing a usable artefact.
